name: neo-consulting-tools
description: Full-lifecycle IT consulting toolkit for Japanese SIer engagements — RFP analysis, proposals, estimation, technical solutions, presentations, and more.

plugins.name: it-consulting-expert
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle IT consulting expert for Japanese SIer engagements. Covers RFP analysis, proposals, team composition, effort/cost estimation, technical solutions, project delivery, presentations (Claude Design), progress reporting, change management, vendor management, maintenance contracts, lessons learned, and multi-perspective review board. NotebookLM integration for RFP-grounded, hallucination-free outputs.
